title: Murder Mystery Roleplay
description: The modpack used for EmDoesStuff's Murder Mystery. Can be used to create your own Murder Mystery fun, or other minigames like it.
body:
**IF THERE ARE ANY CRASHES, TURN OFF OR DELETE BBS MOD!**

The modpack used for the EmDoesStuff's Murder Mystery roleplay series. 
You can watch it below.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xu3fllXw1Mw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This series was created and directed by EmDoesStuff and Toxic Lewi$. 
You can use this modpack for your own creations, whether it be for videos or for fun with your friends. Credit is not required, but it is greatly appreciated.

You can download the map that goes with this modpack [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/emdoesstuff-s-murder-mystery-official-map/).
